title: Hospital Intake Agent Runtime
summary: Serve structured intake assistants that triage symptoms, collect missing context, and route patients to the right next step.
knowledge_base: User: hospital intake and digital access teams.
Primary pain: patient triage flows need structured questions, safety handling, and low-latency responses.
Decision output: recommended routing destination and escalation triggers.
Business impact: faster intake completion and safer routing decisions.

app_modules.label: Intake 01
app_modules.title: Patient Triage Route
app_modules.description: Score an intake interaction and estimate the safest next routing step.

app_modules.label: Intake 02
app_modules.title: Flow Quality Review
app_modules.description: Compare the current structured intake flow against the last approved baseline.

app_modules.label: Intake 03
app_modules.title: Nurse Handoff Brief
app_modules.description: Generate the handoff summary for a clinician when escalation is required.
